cta.title: Ready for your culinary journey?
cta.desc: Explore, experience, and savour the flavours of Vietnam.

home.replay_hint: Take a short pass through the page to see where to start, what to taste, and which journey to follow next.
home.step_hero: This is the opening note of the experience: a cinematic entrance into Vietnamese food culture, designed to spark appetite before you zoom into details.
home.step_search: If you already have a place, dish, or tour in mind, this is the fastest way to jump straight into it.
home.step_tours: Featured tours are for the moments when you want the story fully guided, from markets and kitchens to the table and the people behind each flavour.
home.step_dishes: Prefer to begin with taste itself? Start here. Every dish opens a path into the region, culture, and travel experiences connected to it.
home.step_cta: Once the page has done its job and the curiosity is there, this is the clean handoff from browsing into real exploration.

chatbot.title: Tinh
chatbot.subtitle: Vietnamese Food Assistant
chatbot.welcome:
Hello! 👋
I'm Tinh – the culinary assistant of Essence of Vietnamese Flavours.
I can suggest dishes, food tours, and destinations. Ask me anything!
chatbot.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chatbot.quick_prompt_4: Which tour is suitable for families?
chatbot.api_key_status_empty: No API key set — bot will use default key if available
chatbot.llm_no_key: API key not configured. Click the gear ⚙️ in the chat to enter a key, or add VITE_HF_API_KEY to the .env file.
chatbot.llm_network: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your network.
chatbot.llm_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again in a few seconds.
